name: not_locked_negative_base_passes_through
description: Not locked: stop_trigger_level == base_stop_level even if base is negative. NO floor is applied when not locked.
derivation: dynamic_activation = 1.0. threshold = 0.8. current_return (-0.5) < 0.8 -> ticks stay at 0 (reset, no change from already-zero). 0 < 5 -> not locked. NOT locked -> stop = base_stop_level = -2.5 (NEGATIVE, NOT floored). Catches an impl that floors unconditionally regardless of lock state (would emit 0.0).
